description: Per-learner capability scores and gaps, scoped per track and role. One row per learner + track + role + capability. This is the core of the capability transformation engine — every recommendation decision traces back here.

fields.name: learner_id
fields.description: Learner this capability record belongs to

fields.name: assessment_id
fields.description: Assessment that generated this capability score

fields.name: learning_track_id
fields.description: The learning track this capability record is scoped to. A learner has up to 3 tracks, each with multiple roles.

fields.name: role_id
fields.description: The role within the track this capability is being assessed against. Each track has 3–4 roles.

fields.name: capability_id
fields.description: The specific capability being assessed. References capabilities_master.id.

fields.name: current_score
fields.description: Raw capability score 0–100 derived from assessment

fields.name: current_level
fields.description: Learner's current capability level on the L0–L4 scale derived from assessment. L0=no exposure, L1=awareness, L2=working knowledge, L3=applied skill, L4=mastery.

fields.name: target_level
fields.description: Required capability level for the target role on the L0–L4 scale. Sourced from role_capability_map.required_level. Null if not part of a priority recommendation.

fields.name: gap_score
fields.description: Gap between current score and target score (0–100). Used for path prioritization.

fields.name: priority_band
fields.description: Recommendation priority band. A = highest priority gap, B = secondary gap, null = no gap or assessment-only.

fields.name: why_needed
fields.description: Why this capability is needed for the learner's target role. Populated for priority A and B rows.
fields.example: Monitor production systems and diagnose runtime issues

fields.name: how_to_build
fields.description: How the learner should build this capability. Populated for priority A and B rows.
fields.example: Complete observability course with logging, debugging, and monitoring tools

indexes.name: idx_learner_capabilities_learner_assessment
indexes.description: Fetch all capability scores for a learner from a specific assessment

indexes.name: idx_learner_capabilities_learner_track_role
indexes.description: Fetch all capabilities for a learner scoped to a specific track and role

indexes.name: idx_learner_capabilities_role_capability
indexes.description: Look up a learner's level for a specific capability within a role

indexes.name: idx_learner_capabilities_priority_band
indexes.description: Fetch all priority A or B capabilities for a learner for course recommendation

indexes.name: idx_learner_capabilities_unique
indexes.description: One capability score per learner per assessment per track per role — prevents duplicate rows

relationships.description: Each capability record belongs to one learner
Each capability record is generated from one assessment
Each capability record is scoped to one learning track
Each capability record is assessed against one role within the track
Each record references a master capability definition

sample_records.why_needed: Monitor production systems and diagnose runtime issues
sample_records.how_to_build: Complete observability course with logging, debugging, and monitoring tools
Learn REST/GraphQL principles and database indexing strategies

sample_records.why_needed: Architect robust backend solutions for production
sample_records.how_to_build: Study architecture patterns and scalability principles
Master unit testing, integration testing, and CI/CD practices

sample_records.why_needed: Build predictive models for business insights
sample_records.how_to_build: Complete ML engineering courses with real-world projects
Learn ETL frameworks and distributed computing

sample_records.why_needed: Validate data-driven decisions with statistical rigor
sample_records.how_to_build: Study advanced statistics and experimental design
